title: Act 22 2025 - Supplementary Appropriation Act 2025
text:
[23rd December 2025] Supplementary Approriation Act 377
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE ACT
SUPPLEMENTARY APPROPRIATION ACT, 2025
(Act 22 of 2025)
I assent
22nd December, 2025
AN ACT TO PROVIDE FOR THE PURPOSE OF A SUPPLEMENTARY ESTIMATE APPROVED BY
THE NATIONAL ASSEMBLY.
ENACTED BY THE PRESIDENT AND THE NATIONAL ASSEMBLY.
Short title
1. This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Act, 2025.

[23rd December 2025] Supplementary Approriation Act 378
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE ACT
Appropriation of Expenditure
2. The sum not exceeding four hundred and seventy three million, one hundred
thousand, six hundred and ninety three rupees and eighty seven cents (SCR473,100,693.87)
specified in the supplementary estimate and approved by the resolutions of the National
Assembly on Tuesday 8th October 2024 is hereby appropriated from the Consolidated Fund for
the purposes specified in the supplementary estimate.
I certify that this is a correct copy of the Bill which was passed by the National Assembly on
15th December, 2025.
Mrs. Tania Isaac
Clerk to the National Assembly
